chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 08 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 29.10.2025. Mr. Asad Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G, Sindh. = Counsel for the applicant on instructions no longer wishes to press this Revision. Accordingly, this Revision Application stands dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Tufail
